heading: Insured depository institutions
label: 1814 Insured depository institutions
notes: Prior ProvisionsSection is derived from subsec. (e) of former . See Codification note set out under .section 264 of this titlesection 1811 of this title

children.heading: Banks
children.label: 1 Banks
children.text: Each bank, which is an insured depository institution on , shall be and continue to be, without application or approval, an insured depository institution and shall be subject to the provisions of this chapter.September 21, 1950

children.heading: Savings associations
children.label: 2 Savings associations
children.text: Each savings association the accounts of which were insured by the Federal Savings and Loan Insurance Corporation on the day before , shall be, without application or approval, an insured depository institution.August 9, 1989

children.heading: Continuation of insurance upon becoming a member bank
children.label: b Continuation of insurance upon becoming a member bank
children.text: In the case of an insured bank which is admitted to membership in the Federal Reserve System or an insured State bank which is converted into a national member bank, the bank shall continue as an insured bank.

children.heading: Continuation of insurance after conversion
children.label: c Continuation of insurance after conversion

children.text: any State depository institution which results from the conversion of any insured Federal depository institution; and
any Federal depository institution which results from the conversion of any insured State or Federal depository institution,

children.heading: Continuation of insurance after merger or consolidation
children.label: d Continuation of insurance after merger or consolidation
children.text: Any State depository institution or any Federal depository institution which results from the merger or consolidation of insured depository institutions, or from the merger or consolidation of a noninsured depository institution with an insured depository institution, shall continue as an insured depository institution.
